channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Warriors hoping unorthodox starting lineup sticks beyond opening night
item.description: The Warriors started Steph Curry, Andrew Wiggins, Jonathan Kuminga, Draymond Green and Trayce Jackson-Davis to open their season.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: Jazz blending young and experienced talent on this year's roster
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - There is an interesting blend of talent on the Utah Jazz roster this season. Seven players have six or more years of NBA experience, while seven players have two or less years in the league. So there is a lot of teaching going on.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports NFL power rankings after Week 7 of 2024 NFL season
item.description: To no one's surprise, the Kansas City Chiefs remain No. 1 in our power rankings, but what about the rest of the league? Find now how we rank the 32 teams.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tatum, Celtics celebrate Banner 18 by making record-tying 29 3-pointers and crushing Knicks 132-109
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Jayson Tatum continued Boston’s Banner 18 celebration by scoring 37 points and making eight of the Celtics' NBA record-tying 29 3-pointers on Tuesday as Boston ran away with a 132-109 victory over the New York Knicks on opening night.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tickets now on sale for San Diego's 2025 Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: This will be San Diego's 73rd year hosting a PGA Tour event and the 58th time it's being held at Torrey Pines Golf Course.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Want to see the Dodgers in the World Series? Prepare for sticker shock
item.description: The Boys in Blue are back in the World Series, and the matchup with the New York Yankees is sure to draw a great deal of attention. If you want to catch a game in person, however, it will also cost you a great deal of cash.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Texas fined $250K for trash thrown onto field, must ID and ban fans
item.description: The SEC said it won't suspend alcohol sales at Texas events, but "reserves the right to do so if other requirements are not met.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, NewsNation

item.title: Russell Wilson throws for 2 TDs, runs for another TD in Pittsburgh debut as Steelers rout Jets 37-15
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Russell Wilson sat at the podium, uniform still on, in no rush to move on from a moment he believed would always come. Even as the weeks passed and his aching calf struggled to get better. Even as Justin Fields deftly guided the Pittsburgh Steelers in his place.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS and advance to face Yankees in World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dodgers vs. Yankees in the World Series? It's more common than you think
item.description: The Fall Classic is set, and the matchup is a classic all right. The Los Angeles Dodgers clinched the National League pennant on Sunday, closing out the New York Mets in six games in the NL Championship Series. That means that baseball fans are getting a dream matchup in the World Series.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: National League Champions: Dodgers advance to the World Series with 10-5 win over Mets
item.description: Tommy Edman and Will Smith homered to send Shohei Ohtani into the World Series for the first time, and the Los Angeles Dodgers eliminated the New York Mets with a 10-5 victory in Game 6 of the NL Championship Series on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Andy Ludwig steps down as Utes offensive coordinator
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Following another dismal offensive performance against TCU, Andy Ludwig has stepped down as Utah's offensive coordinator and quarterbacks coach. Utah head coach Kyle Whittingham released a statement Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah Royals playoff dreams shattered amid 1-1 draw with Angel City FC
item.description: Utah Royals FC had a slim - but possible - chance of making the NWSL playoffs, but it was more likely they were going to be eliminated.
item.dc:creator: Stockton Mair, ABC 4

item.title: Olympian to drug lord: Snowboarder accused of running drug ring
item.description: Wedding competed for Canada in the 2002 Winter Olympics in Salt Lake City; according to the official Olympics website, he finished 24th in the parallel giant slalom event.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, NewsNation

item.title: Guardians starting Tanner Bibee in Game 5 against Yankees after short outing earlier in ALCS
item.description: Tanner Bibee is getting a second crack at the Yankees in the AL Championship Series. His first one didn't go so well. The right-hander will start for the Cleveland Guardians in Game 5 on Saturday after he was pulled from Game 2 in the second inning by manager Stephen Vogt.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: These Dick's Sporting Goods stores will sell championship gear after closing hours if the Dodgers win on Friday
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers can punch their tickets to the World Series on Friday night, and Southern California fans itching to get their hands on some championship merchandise can do so quickly.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Broncos dominate Saints in Payton's return to New Orleans
item.description: For all four quarters. For all 60 minutes. The Denver Broncos were in complete control of the Saints.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: The domed ballpark would have a 373,000-square-foot footprint and is expected to reach a height of 320 feet.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, NewsNation

item.title: Criticism sparked over Snapdragon Stadium field conditions
item.description: The San Diego Wave FC lost 1-0 to Mexico’s Club America Wednesday. Both teams are advancing to the semifinals, but it was the turf that was the talk of the tailgate.
item.dc:creator: Jaime Chambers, Fox 5

item.title: Shohei Ohtani homers as the Dodgers rout the Mets 8-0 for a 2-1 lead in the NLCS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — By the time Shohei Ohtani stepped to the plate in the eighth inning Wednesday night, the Los Angeles Dodgers were already in control. Once the ball left his bat, Game 3 of the National League Championship Series was over.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KTLA 5
